## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` or `bun run ci` passes
- [ ] `bun run secrets:staged` passes
- [ ] Slash command changes update `README.md`, `docs/COMMANDS.md`, and tests
- [ ] No `.env`, tokens, Jellyfin passwords, or generated clips in the diff
- [ ] Commit messages use Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, …)
